use_cases: Collecting quick user satisfaction ratings on web applications
Gathering instant feedback after feature releases or updates
Measuring customer experience at touchpoints in SaaS products
Adding lightweight rating systems to developer tools and dashboards
Enabling one-click feedback collection on websites without full surveys
ai_summary: A lightweight feedback widget that collects user satisfaction through an emoji-based rating system. Features animated transitions using motion/react, accessible toggle group selection via Radix UI, and supports inline markdown for customizable feedback prompts. Designed for quick, low-friction feedback collection on any web application.
